_comment: mini_bot MCP servers. Copy to state/mcp.json (or run /mcp to see template). qoder auto-loads via --mcp-config.

filesystem._comment: Read/write files under a single root dir. npx pulls @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem on first run.

fetch._comment: Fetch URLs and return clean markdown. Needs `uv` (https://docs.astral.sh/uv).

git._comment: Read git repo state (log, diff, blame).
